title: Deprecated module parameter registration methods
description: Code calls SetParameterType(), CreateParameter(), RestrictUnknownParameters(), or GetModuleParameters() which were deprecated in CMSMS 2.2.8.
explanation: SetParameterType(), CreateParameter(), RestrictUnknownParameters(), and GetModuleParameters() were deprecated in CMSMS 2.2.8. Modules should now clean parameters directly using filter_var() or type casting. In the future, $params in module actions will only consist of parameters passed on the module tag.
fix: Remove SetParameterType/CreateParameter/RestrictUnknownParameters calls. Validate $params values directly with filter_var(), (int) casting, or htmlspecialchars().
